---
title: "Inverse Penetration Adjustment"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{adjust-inverse-penetration}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
candidate_roots <- c(".", "..", "../..")
pkg_root <- candidate_roots[file.exists(file.path(candidate_roots, "DESCRIPTION"))][1]
if (is.na(pkg_root)) {
  stop("Could not locate the debiasR package root.")
}

if (!requireNamespace("debiasR", quietly = TRUE)) {
  if (!requireNamespace("devtools", quietly = TRUE)) {
    stop("Install either `debiasR` or `devtools` to load the local package.")
  }
  devtools::load_all(pkg_root, quiet = TRUE)
}

library(debiasR)

has_debiasRdata <- requireNamespace("debiasRdata", quietly = TRUE)
if (!has_debiasRdata) {
  cat("Install `debiasRdata` to run the empirical MSOA travel-to-work vignette.\n")
  knitr::knit_exit()
}

if (has_debiasRdata) {
  example_data <- debiasR_example_data(n_areas = 25)
  msoa_OD_travel2work <- example_data$msoa_OD_travel2work
  census_msoa_OD_travel2work <- example_data$census_msoa_OD_travel2work
  coverage <- example_data$coverage
}
```

This vignette is a lightweight starter for the inverse-penetration adjustment
workflow using the `debiasRdata` MSOA travel-to-work datasets.

```{r}
adjusted <- adjust_inverse_penetration(
  mpd_od_df = msoa_OD_travel2work,
  coverage_df = coverage,
  weight_by = "origin"
)

head(adjusted)
```
